title: A new look!
excerpt: Our community is getting a a new look. While the changes are being implemented over the next few days,  our website may be a little slow so stay patient and get excited for our new community!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Our community is getting a a new look. While the changes are being implemented over the next few days, our website may be a little slow so stay patient and get excited for our new community!

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Instead of working on making changes to the community, can you please put time and effort into improvements to the Monday system that will make massive differences to fixing work flow flaws. Eg: Adding an End time to the date column so that it can create a block of Time in the calendar (9:00am to 1:00pm) as an example.

This request has been in the community forums for 4 years now and it is still not implemented. It has had over 25000 views. End users need this feature ASAP

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Terry - we appreciate your feedback and are working with teams internally to improve release processes If you haven’t already, we encourage you to have a read of our new feature request process rundown for some background about how it all works - All you need to know about our new feature request process.

I did also want to mention that the feature request to Add start and end times to the date column is on our roadmap for release in the very near future
